meta.description: AnimateDiff txt2vid → ComfyUI expected output summary

critical_enforcements: R05: pipeline_type is txt2vid (video model requires video pipeline)
R12: VHS_VideoCombine (from VideoHelperSuite) must be the terminal output node
AnimateDiffLoaderWithContext sits between CheckpointLoaderSimple.MODEL and KSampler.model
Base model is SD1.5 (CheckpointLoaderSimple), not SDXL/Flux
Prompts use CLIPTextEncode (SD1.5 style), not SDXL variant
